description:
The owner's manual documents tone categories 0-35 in the TONE_CATEGORY_NAMES array at crates/integral-core/src/svd.rs (tone_category_name() function, ~line 155). SVD files from expansion packs (e.g. Synth Legends I7SL.SVD) use values 36-38 which currently display as '?N' in the CLI (see SvdEntry::category_display() in crates/integral-cli/src/main.rs ~line 833).

Approach options:
- Capture MIDI traffic from the iPad app's category browser to see if it sends/receives category labels
- Extract from the owner's manual PDF (i7-e3e) — may have a more complete list
- Empirically map by examining factory presets with known instrument types

Once identified, extend TONE_CATEGORY_NAMES in svd.rs to cover the full range.

comments.text: Key finding: device shows SL-JP8 1 as category 'Syn.PAD:Synth Pad/Strings' but SVD value is 38. Our TONE_CATEGORY_NAMES assumed sequential 0-35 mapping from the manual's comma-separated list, but the actual numeric values are NOT sequential. Need more device-confirmed data points to build the real mapping. The device also uses short codes (e.g. 'Syn.PAD') alongside long names.

title: Identify undocumented tone category values 36+
